rows.requirement: Checkpointing records the WAL offset up to which state is durably applied
manifest.json reflects correct offset after checkpoint (round-trip)
Segments fully before the checkpoint pointer are eligible for truncation/archival
rows.test: TestCheckpointManifest (ArchivableSegments assertion: exactly segments strictly before checkpoint's segment number)

rows.requirement: Checkpoint's own segment and later segments are NOT archivable
LoadCheckpoint on directory with no manifest yet returns found=false, err=nil
Manifest write is atomic (temp file + Sync + rename, no torn manifest.json)
rows.test: Code inspection of Checkpoint (temp-file+Sync+os.Rename idiom, matching engine/btree/persist.go precedent); not independently crash-injection-tested in this subtask (deferred to 1.3.5-style crash-injection work per existing repo convention)

rows.requirement: No regression in existing engine/wal tests (1.3.1, 1.3.2)
